name: functional-skill-creator
description: Specification repository for functional authoring, migration, testing, and tracing of agent skills.

scripts.test:cases: node skills/fskill-creator/scripts/test_cases.mjs skills/fskill-creator && node skills/fskill-creator/sub-skills/migrate/scripts/test_cases.mjs skills/fskill-creator/sub-skills/migrate && node skills/fskill-creator/scripts/test_cases.mjs examples/meeting-notes-to-actions
scripts.lint:skills: node skills/fskill-creator/scripts/lint_skill.mjs skills/fskill-creator && node skills/fskill-creator/scripts/lint_skill.mjs skills/fskill-creator/sub-skills/create && node skills/fskill-creator/sub-skills/migrate/scripts/lint_skill.mjs skills/fskill-creator/sub-skills/migrate
scripts.check: npm run test:skill-scripts && npm run test:example-scripts && npm run test:cases && npm run lint:examples && npm run lint:skills
